project_type: Next.js 16 app with React 19, Tailwind CSS 4, TypeScript
build_system: bun (bun.lock present), Next.js build system. No npm/node available, use bun instead.
test_framework: No test framework configured (no test files or test runner in package.json)
verification_instructions: Run `bun run build` to verify compilation and static generation succeed. Run `bun run lint` for linting.
setup_instructions: Run `bun install` in the project root to install dependencies.
environment_constraints: Only `bun` is available as runtime (no npm/node). Build works with bun. Worker thread warnings appear but don't block the build.
contribution_requirements: Follow AGENTS.md - this is Next.js 16 with breaking changes from prior versions. Use responsive Tailwind CSS utility classes. Ensure Semantic HTML for all layout sections.
key_patterns: Components live in app/components/. Pages use App Router (app/page.tsx, app/favorites/page.tsx, app/track/[id]/page.tsx). Custom Tailwind theme colors defined in globals.css using @theme inline. Dark mode via prefers-color-scheme. Client components marked with 'use client'. Links use next/link, images use next/image.
directory_structure: app/ - App Router pages and components. app/components/ - Shared UI components. app/favorites/ - Favorites page. app/track/[id]/ - Track detail page. lib/ - Utility/API functions. public/ - Static assets.
